name: workspace-first-architecture
description: Enterprise AI governance pipeline using the Workspace-First Architecture pattern. Each project runs telemetry, review, and delivery stages backed by structured HITL checkpoints.

registered_agents.role: Synthesizes telemetry signals into a final risk posture and pulse summary narrative.
Pulls cloud spend actuals and compares against approved monthly budget thresholds.
Validates ERP financial setup for a project and emits a structured verdict.
